note: This routine calls both APIs directly at run time - there is no file-based handoff in this repo. See routine_instruction.md for the exact flow.

upload_api.note: quant_analysis must be a JSON-encoded STRING (not a nested object), matching how existing records store it. Do not send run_date - the server stamps it as today's date server-side. Server upserts by (ticker, run_date=today), so re-uploads same-day update the existing record instead of duplicating.
upload_api.known_gap: This endpoint also accepts deal_type/region/sector/pricing_date/unique_deal_id/issuer_name and blanks them on today's record if omitted (update_or_create writes every key in defaults regardless). The technical_api fetch above does not return any of these fields, so the routine has no source for them and intentionally omits them. If anything downstream filters/displays on those fields, today's uploaded record will not have them populated.
